# tapdot

> tapdot is a one-person software studio building small, fast, privacy-first browser extensions, web apps, and 90+ browser tools. No ads, no analytics, no accounts required for extensions or tools. What can run locally, runs locally — most AI features use on-device models (Gemini Nano), never sending page content to a server.

## Extensions (Chrome Web Store, all free and live)

- [FloatDeck](https://tapdot.org/floatdeck/): A draggable floating button that fans into a radial menu of one-tap actions — screenshots, dark & reading mode, QR codes, copy tools, translate, and more. 25+ actions.
- [Tab Memory Manager](https://tapdot.org/tab-memory-manager/): Shows estimated memory per tab, then hibernates, closes, or groups idle tabs in one click.
- [Margin](https://tapdot.org/margin/): 25 curated news topics as swipeable, InShorts-style cards in the browser side panel, with on-device AI summaries.
- [CommentIQ](https://tapdot.org/commentiq/): Analyzes YouTube comments with on-device AI — sentiment breakdown, topic extraction, questions and ideas.
- [Quill](https://tapdot.org/quill/): Apple-style AI writing tools for any page — rewrite in any tone, proofread, summarize, and transform selected text, on-device with Gemini Nano.

## Web apps

- [LaunchPad](https://launch.tapdot.org/): Describe a product once and LaunchPad drafts a native post for 30+ launch channels (Hacker News, Product Hunt, X, Reddit, LinkedIn, and more, plus custom channels), opening each platform's real composer pre-filled. Requires a free Google sign-in to save drafts; first launch is free with every AI engine and channel unlocked.
- [PeerReview](https://peerreview.tapdot.org/): A review exchange for indie developers. List your product, get matched to review someone else's, and they review yours in return — a strict one-for-one exchange verified by real people, no karma farming. Free to list. Requires a free Google sign-in.

## Tools

- [tapdot tools](https://tools.tapdot.org/): 90+ privacy-first web tools across 10 categories (Study, Write, Dev, Design, Finance, Health, HR, Legal, Marketing, Productivity). All run locally in the browser, no account needed.

## Contact

- Email: ceo@tapdot.org
